# LWSG-LUX-OS
A simple command-line operating system.
#### **The current code is an unfinished graphical test, almost unusable. If there is a usable version of the code, please send an issue or contact me via my email zgmcwcj@outlook.com.**
**The code is entirely self-edited, and the comments are all generated by AI, which may contain errors. Please verify carefully.**

Currently supported commands:
- help         -Show help
- about        -About the OS
- mem          -Show memory information(Coming Soon)
- dir          -List files(Coming Soon)
- type         -Display file contect
- calc         -Calculator application
- edit         -Text editor
- files        -File manager(Coming Soon)
- run          -Run a program
- time         -Show current time(BIOS Time)
- date         -Show current date(BIOS Date)
- ver          -Show version information
- info         -System information
- echo         -Echo text
- clear        -Clear screen
- reboot       -Reboot System
